hero.title: Kutungamira uye repository modhi
hero.lead: IATF inochengeta mapurojekiti ekuwanika ari pachena, anoverengwa, uye anogadziriswa.
support: Peji rino rinotsanangura zvinokodzera, kuti nzvimbo dzekuchengetera dzinochengetwa sei, uye kuti mutoro weiyo nzvimbo yekuchengetera unoshanda mushure mekugamuchirwa.

header.title: Basa rakakodzera, kuva muridzi, kupiwa marezenisi

cards.title: Basa rakakodzera
paragraphs: IATF inogamuchira basa rinogadzirisa chipingamupinyi chaicho chekuwanika uye rine pachena kukosha kwevanhu.
Chirongwa chinofanira kuva chinobatsira kupfuura rimwe basa roga roga uye rinoshanda sebhuku revanhu vose.

Nokuda kwekuwanika kwewebhu, IATF inoshandisa [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Ruzivo rwakananga rwevashandisi vehunyanzvi hwekubatsira huriwo humbowo hwechokwadi hwekuti chii chinoshanda mukushandiswa chaiko.

cards.title: Kugamuchirwa kweprojekti
paragraphs: Chikumbiro chinogona kugamuchirwa apo kunzvera kunoratidza kuti:
items: chinetso chacho chakajeka zvakakwana kuti chiongororwe
nharaunda yacho ndeyechokwadi zvakakwana kuti itange
pane nzira inonzwisisika yekuchengetedza kana kupedzisa

cards.title: Repository muridzi
paragraphs: Zvirongwa zvinogamuchirwa zvinogadzirwa pasi pesangano reIATF GitHub.
Midziyo inochengeterwa zvinhu inogara imomo kuitira kuti basa rimwe nerimwe rirambe riripo, kunyange kana vanorichengeta vakazochinja.

cards.title: Kubvumidzwa
paragraphs: IATF mapurojekiti anoshandisa copyleft rezinesi kunze kwekunge chirongwa chakataura neimwe nzira:

maintainer.title: Injiniya ane mutoro kana muchengeti
paragraphs: Chirongwa chimwe nechimwe chinogamuchirwa chinofanira kuva neinjiniya ane mutoro ane zita kana muchengeti. Munhu iyeye anogona kugamuchira mvumo yekugadzirisa kune repository uye anotarisirwa ku:
items: ongorora kana kutarisira nyaya uye kudhonza zvikumbiro
ita kuti basa racho rinzwisiswe nevamwe
maintainer.footnote: Iri ndiro repository-pamwero mutoro. sangano muridzi anoramba pamwe IATF. mutoro pano ndiyo repositori stewardship, hwokugadzira nhungamiro, uye voruzhinji kwokubatana  kwete risingagumi private hurukuro, tsika integrations, kana basa pamwero kuzvipira kunze paruzhinji roadmap.

publicDevelopment.title: Kuvandudzwa kwevanhu
paragraphs: Zvirongwa zvakatangwa kuburikidza neIATF zvinokudziridzwa pachena nekutadza. Repository ndiyo sosi yeruzhinji yezvokwadi ye:
publicDevelopment.footnote: Ruzivo rwakakosha rweprojekti harufanire kungogara mukutaurirana kwepachivande kana mumabhokisi ekutumira.

paragraphs: IATF inoshanda pachena nekutadza. Zvikumbiro zvinopinda muIATF kuburikidza newebhusaiti, email, Discord, GitHub, kana zvimwe zviteshi zveIATF zvinogona kuve zvinyorwa zveveruzhinji zvekukumbira.
IATF inogona kupfupisa, kugadzirisa, kana kugadzirisazve chikumbiro chisati chaburitswa kuitira kuti zvido zvekuwanika zviongororwe pasina kuburitsa ruzivo rwemunhu zvisina basa.
Zvinyorwa zveruzhinji zvikumbiro zvinogona kuchengetwa muIATF GitHub sangano, pane ino webhusaiti, kana zvese zviri zviviri.

IATF inobvisa zvisingadiwe zvemunhu zvekutaurirana, kero dzepachivande, uye ruzivo rwekuziva nezvevashandisi vega vega vehunyanzvi hwekubatsira kunze kwekunge kuburitswa kwacho kwakarongwa uye kwakakodzera.

Discord inoshandiswa pakuronga zvisina kurongwa. IATF haichengeti nhaurirano dzeDiscord zvakasiyana nekutadza, uye kuchengetwa kwemeseji kunodzorwa neDiskord. Zvisarudzo zvakaitwa muDiscort zvinofanirwa kupfupikiswa muzvinyorwa zveveruzhinji paGitHub kana papeji reprojekti rakakodzera.

Zvinyorwa zvekukumbira hazvibatanidzwe kubva pakutsvaga injini yekutsvaga kana zvichinyatsogoneka. Veruzhinji zvinoreva kuongororwa uye kuzvidavirira. Izvo hazvirevi kugadziriswa kwekuwanikwa kuburikidza nemazita ekutsvaga.

IATF inogona kugadzirisa kana kubvisa zvinyorwa kubva kunzvimbo dzeveruzhinji dzinodzorwa neIATF, asi haigone kuvimbisa kubviswa kubva kune yechitatu-bato caches, zviziviso, forks, screenshots, injini dzekutsvaga, Discord, kana mamwe masisitimu ekunze.
Kana shoko richida kuramba riri roga, usariendesa nomumigwagwa yevoruzhinji yeIATF.

chair.lead: Sachigaro anobata sangano-pamwero stewardship pamusoro IATF. Izvi zvakasiyana paminiti-chirongwa mutariri injiniya basa: sachigaro ndiye mutariri sangano rose, kwete zuva nezuva kutungamirirwa chero chete repository.

duties.title: Zvinoitwa nechigaro
items: Anobata muridzi mvumo pamusoro IATF GitHub sangano
Anobvumidza kugamuchirwa kwepurojekiti uye zvisarudzo zvekuchengetedza
duties.footnote: Sachigaro haasungiri IATF kuti private pakukurukura, akabhadhara basa, kana basa-pamwero zvibvumirano, uye haaiti pamusoro-pa-repository maintainer zvisarudzo pamusoro hwokugadzira mirayiridzo.

election.title: Kusarudzwa kwegore negore
paragraphs: Sachigaro anosarudzwa kamwe chete pagore. Kusarudzwa kunoitwa mumavhiki maviri okutanga aDecember, migumisiro inoziviswa naDecember 15, uye nguva itsva inotanga musi waJanuary 1.

Vhoti vanokodzera vanhu vakabata chinzvimbo chekuchengetedza pane chero repository reIATF mukati megore uye vakaita kanokwana kamwe kubatanidzwa mupiro kune re IATF gore iro. Vhoti yega yega inokodzera ine vhoti imwe. Mumiriri ane mavhoti mazhinji anokunda; kana paine tie, runoff inoitwa muvhiki rechitatu raZvita.
Sarudzo inoitwa sehurukuro yeruzhinji yeGitHub mudura rakasarudzwa rehutongi hweIATF, saka vavhoterwa, kuvhota, uye mhedzisiro zvese chikamu chezvinyorwa zveveruzhinji.

continuity.title: Kupfuurira
paragraphs: Kana pasina sarudzo inoitwa mugore rakapihwa, sachigaro aripo anoramba ari pachinzvimbo kusvika pasarudzo inotevera. Uku kuenderera mberi kusingazivikanwe, kwete nguva yekuzorora  modhi yakagadzirirwa kuchengetedza sangano rakagadzikana kana chiitiko chakaderera, kwete kumanikidza shanduko iyo isina munhu akagadzirira.
Sachigaro anogona kusiya basa chero nguva. Vanochengetedza vanoshanda vanogonawo kudana sarudzo dzinoshamisa nechikonzero chakataurwa, chinoitwa pasi pemitemo yakafanana nesarudzo yegore negore.

chair.footnote: Basa sachigaro akanga formalized muna 2026 kuti sangano-pamwero utariri zvakajeka. Kusvikira ipapo, sangano basa raiitwa informally kubudikidza muvambi.

states.title: Mamiriro ezvinhu epurojekiti
paragraphs: Zvirongwa zvinoshandisa boka duku rehurumende dzehurumende:
states.footnote: Nyika idzi dzinoita kuti kunyoresa kuve nyore kuongorora.

reassignment.title: Kugoverwazve uye kuchengeta muzvinyorwa
paragraphs: Kana muchengeti achienda kure kana kuti asingachaiti basa, IATF inogona kugovera mutoro, kumbomisa kuvandudza, kana kuchengeta purojekiti.
Gadziriro inogonawo kuchengetwa apo chinodikanwa chapakuvamba chakasangana, gadziriro yamira, kana kuti kupfuurira kwebasa hakusati kuchiri kwechokwadi.
reassignment.footnote: Zvirongwa zvakachengetwa zvinoramba zvichionekwa nevoruzhinji kunze kwokunge pane chikonzero chinogombedzera chokuti zviitwe neimwe nzira.

items: kuchengetedza kwenguva refu kweprojekti imwe neimwe
boundaries.footnote: IATF i public repository model, kwete private delivery service.
